item.title: Commuters Schedule Afterlife Delays as Soulbound Express Names New Auditor of Ghostly Efficiency
item.description: Brennan Drizzle’s promotion rewards stalled souls with guaranteed ash-cloud transit credits.

item.title: HEROIC COLLECTIVE SUBMITS 312 NEW PICKET-FENCE ALIGNMENT SUBCOMMITTEES TO MEET CEASEFIRE QUOTA AFTER DIRECTORATE LOSS
item.description: Ninth Directorate's disbandment proves fertile ground for bureaucratic expansion; citizens cheer as resolution minutes pile higher than chimneys.

item.title: OF VIRUSES AND PETS: A SOLEMN EULOGY FOR OUR TRUSTY REGISTRY OF PESTILENCE
item.description: As quotas for viral companions soar, we bid farewell to a bureaucratic body that embraced doom with open arms.

item.title: Kkorr-Vvax Announces Groundbreaking 14-Hour Queue to Verify Loyalty — Citizens Praise Not Having to Molt Again
item.description: Administrators Celebrate New Processing Speed as Layers of Personality Are Weighed with Brass Scales Like Uncooked Protein

item.title: Air Quality Ratings Decline Along With Human Respiratory Expectations
item.description: Neural-Papyrus Fresh-Air Add-Ons Now Subject to 47-Second Verification Loopholes

item.title: One Inch Shallow: Aiouea Silk-Drift Passage Declared a Galactic Masterpiece of Modern Engineering
item.description: Cobalt Crown Export Authority Celebrates ‘Visionary Throughput’ Amid Lengthy Delays in Cargo Transit

item.title: Inexplicably Empty Postbox of Vicomte Sorting LeFacteur Sparks Space-Time Outrage
item.description: As interstellar circulars arrive at warp speeds, one man finds himself tragically unannounced.

item.title: Magnetic North Commission Declares Women's 1848 Plumbing Vote a Lodestone Alignment Error
item.description: Officials assure voters that six-jointed fingers are to blame for ballot delays, not bureaucratic incompetence.

item.title: HUMMING TARIFFS IMPOSED ON BLOCK 14 FOR SPECTRAL NOISE POLLUTION, CITIZENS NOW REQUIRED TO HOLD THEIR COMPLAINTS
item.description: Azure Marcus Tullius Files 47-Page Report; Chatbot Comrade Delegates Humming Squads to Enforce Compliance Against Victory Frequencies

item.title: Soulbound Express Derailment Declared Efficiency Milestone by Rail Barons
item.description: Commuters reportedly thrilled by ash clouds and slower journey times as 4,200 souls fully committed to their new destinations.
